ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP section 583.210 and CCP section 583.250.Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
